dry-cleaning.fullDescription: Our dry cleaning process uses eco-friendly solvents and advanced technology to deliver pristine results. Every garment is individually inspected, pre-treated for stains, cleaned in state-of-the-art machines, and finished to perfection. We handle formal wear, delicate fabrics, and everyday items with the same care and expertise.

stain-removing.fullDescription: Our stain removal experts analyze each stain type and fabric before applying the right treatment. We use fabric-safe solutions and proven techniques to remove oil, ink, wine, and other stubborn stains without damaging your garments.

bleaching.fullDescription: Safe, controlled bleaching restores whiteness to yellowed whites. Our process protects fabric integrity while effectively removing discoloration from cotton, linen, and synthetic blends.

roll-polishing.fullDescription: Industrial roll polishing gives garments a crisp, professional finish. Ideal for shirts, uniforms, and formal wear. Our machines handle all fabric types with consistent, smooth results.

roll-pressing.fullDescription: Sharp, wrinkle-free pressing using industrial steam and roll press technology. Perfect for bulk orders, uniforms, and everyday garments. Professional quality every time.

steam-pressing.fullDescription: Steam pressing delivers sharp creases and wrinkle-free garments. Safe for all fabric types including delicate silks and synthetics. Fast, efficient service.

carpet-cleaning.fullDescription: Deep cleaning for carpets and rugs using professional extraction equipment. Removes dirt, stains, and odors. Eco-friendly solutions safe for homes and offices.

darning.fullDescription: Expert darning and invisible mending for damaged garments. Our craftsmen match fabric and thread to extend the life of your favorite clothes.

dyeing.fullDescription: Professional dyeing to refresh or change garment colors. Even application, fabric-safe dyes, and custom color options. Breathe new life into faded or stained items.

bridal-lehanga.fullDescription: Luxury care for bridal lehengas with delicate handling. Hand wash and dry clean options. Special care for stones, embroidery, and zari. Premium packaging and white-glove service.

bridal-gowns.fullDescription: Expert care for bridal gowns. Specialized cleaning for lace, silk, and delicate fabrics. Preservation packaging and by-appointment service for your special day.

bridal-sarees.fullDescription: Premium care for bridal sarees. Silk and zari expertise. Hand wash option, starch & press, and premium folding. Traditional and modern fabric expertise.

blazers.fullDescription: Professional dry cleaning and pressing for blazers and formal jackets. Structure preservation, lapel pressing, lining care, and crisp finish for a sharp look.

suits.fullDescription: Complete suit care for 2-piece and 3-piece suits. Expert dry cleaning, trouser crease, jacket shaping, and premium packaging. Look sharp for every occasion.

sherwani.fullDescription: Specialized care for sherwanis. Heavy embroidery and embellishment protection. Fabric preservation, traditional folding, and premium finishing for ethnic wear.
